changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS analytics;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION analytics.translation_value(translations jsonb, locale text, property text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$ SELECT (elem->>'value') FROM jsonb_array_elements(translations) elem WHERE elem->>'locale' = $2 AND elem->>'property' = $3 LIMIT 1 $$;

rollback.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS analytics.translation_value(jsonb, text, text);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option_set AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_set_id, os.id AS option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, os.code, os.name AS name_default, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), os.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), os.name)) AS name_ar, os.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(os.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(os.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.option_set os;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option_set;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_id, o.id AS option_id, o.uid AS option_uid, o.option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, o.code, o.name AS name_default, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), o.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), o.name)) AS name_ar, o.sort_order, os.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(os.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(os.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.option_value o LEFT JOIN public.option_set os ON os.id = o.option_set_id;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit AS WITH base AS ( SELECT ou.id, ou.uid, ou.code, ou.name, ou.level::int AS level_int, ou.parent_id, ou.path, COALESCE(ou.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations, regexp_split_to_array(trim(BOTH ',' FROM coalesce(ou.path, '')), ',') AS path_array, ou.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(ou.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(ou.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit ou ) SELECT b.id, b.uid AS org_unit_uid, b.code, b.name AS name_default, b.level_int, b.parent_id, b.path AS path_text, b.path_array, (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('uid', ou2.uid, 'name', ou2.name, 'level', ou2.level) ORDER BY ord) FROM unnest(b.path_array) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(uid, ord) JOIN public.org_unit ou2 ON ou2.uid = t.uid ) AS ancestors, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[1]) LIMIT 1) AS level_0_name, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), b.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), b.name)) AS name_ar, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[2]) LIMIT 1) AS level_1_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[3]) LIMIT 1) AS level_2_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[4]) LIMIT 1) AS level_3_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[5]) LIMIT 1) AS level_4_name, b.last_modified_by, (b.source_last_modified_at::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM base b;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit_group AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_org_unit_group_id, g.id AS group_id, g.uid AS group_uid, g.code, g.name AS name_default, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(g.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), g.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(g.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), g.name)) AS name_ar, COALESCE(g.properties_map::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) AS properties_jsonb, g.inactive, g.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(g.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(g.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit_group g;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS id, gm.group_id, g.uid AS group_uid, gm.org_unit_id, ou.uid AS org_unit_uid, GREATEST(COALESCE(g.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(g.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit_group_members gm LEFT JOIN public.org_unit_group g ON g.id = gm.group_id LEFT JOIN public.org_unit ou ON ou.id = gm.org_unit_id;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit_group;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_team AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_team_id, t.id AS team_id, t.uid AS team_uid, t.code, t.name AS name_default, t.activity_id, act.uid AS activity_uid, t.disabled, COALESCE(t.form_permissions, '[]'::jsonb) AS form_permissions_jsonb, t.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(t.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(t.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.team t LEFT JOIN public.activity act ON act.id = t.activity_id;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_team_form_permission AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS id, t.uid AS team_uid, t.id AS team_id, fp ->> 'form' AS form_uid, (fp -> 'permissions')::jsonb AS permissions_jsonb, t.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(t.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(t.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.team t, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(t.form_permissions, '[]'::jsonb)) fp;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_team_form_permission; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_team;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_assignment AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_assignment_id, a.id AS assignment_id, a.uid AS assignment_uid, a.deleted::boolean AS deleted, a.activity_id, act.uid AS activity_uid, a.start_day, a.org_unit_id, ou.uid AS org_unit_uid, ou.code AS org_unit_code, a.team_id, t.uid AS team_uid, t.code AS team_code, COALESCE(a.forms, '[]'::jsonb) AS forms_jsonb, f.form_uid, a.allocated_resources, a.status, a.last_submitted_by, a.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(a.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(a.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.assignment a LEFT JOIN public.org_unit ou ON ou.id = a.org_unit_id LEFT JOIN public.team t ON t.id = a.team_id LEFT JOIN public.activity act ON act.id = a.activity_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT value::text AS form_uid FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(a.forms, '[]'::jsonb)) AS arr(value) ) f ON TRUE;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_assignment;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_activity AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_activity_id, a.id AS activity_id, a.uid AS activity_uid, a.code, a.name AS name_default, a.start_date::timestamp AS start_date, a.end_date::timestamp AS end_date,
a.project_id, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(a.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), a.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(a.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), a.name)) AS name_ar, a.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(a.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(a.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.activity a;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_activity;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_data_template AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_template_id, dt.id AS data_template_id, dt.uid AS data_template_uid, dt.version_uid AS version_uid, dt.version_number AS version_no, dt.code, dt.name AS name_default, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), dt.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), dt.name)) AS name_ar, dt.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(dt.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(dt.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.data_template dt;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_data_template;
